notes.note: Failed to Revise: Web search found the paper as an arXiv preprint (arXiv:2512.08854, posted Dec 9, 2025) and an OpenReview entry showing it as a submission to ICLR 2026 (Submission #20239, submitted Sep 19, 2025; revised Jan 26, 2026). I could not find any public record of an accepted publication or proceedings entry. Because the venue is therefore ambiguous (preprint + under review) and no confirmed acceptance/publication exists, I cannot confidently assign a publication venue.
